name: Office Application Startup Persistence
description: Detects file writes to Office startup folders used for persistence
query:
// Detect writes to Office startup directories
// Trigger on files placed in XLSTART, STARTUP, or Office template paths
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)(XLSTART|Microsoft\\Word\\STARTUP|Microsoft\\Excel\\STARTUP|Microsoft\\Outlook\\.*\.otm)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
